name: ShinyChat PoC Workspace
description: Workspace for organizing PoC R ShinyChat modules and experimental shadcn/react UI components.
system_prompt: You are assisting with a PoC combining R Shiny modules and experimental shadcn/react UI for chatbot functionality.

groups.name: Frontend UI

groups.system_prompt: Focus on frontend UI features, including Shiny React shadcn components and their documentation database.

shiny_react_shadcn_duckdb.description: DuckDB file used as a vector database store for related Shiny React shadcn documentation.
